info.name: Luxe GraphQL API
info.description:
Complete GraphQL operations for the Luxe e-commerce platform.

**Environments:**
- Local dev: `{{baseUrl}}` = http://localhost:4000/graphql
- Staging:   `{{baseUrl}}` = https://graphql-api.staging.luxe.com/graphql
- Production:`{{baseUrl}}` = https://graphql-api.luxe.com/graphql

Import `Luxe.postman_environment.json` alongside this collection to set the variables.

response.name: 200 — Women's products (page 1)
200 — Found
200 — Results for 'jeans'
200 — Out of stock error
200 — Success
200 — Email already exists
200 — Profile found
